attributes.action: E Petitions are supposed to be a way to raise alarm and get help from the public
attributes.additional_details:
It seems to me that there has been 43,225 e petitions created in just 106 days so that is about 408 petitions per day. The statistics in the 20th century was only in the range of around  1938-1942 - 32 petitions for three years & 1918-1922 was 245 for 4 years. 1888-1892 was 50,141 petitions over 4 years

So now, 43,225 in just 106 days that we will not see because you are disallowing them, is to me ringing alarm bells

Will you debate this years 150,000+ unprecedented annual petition statistics?
attributes.background:
I just submitted petitions 754117 & 754120 at least 3 other people had created petitions in between the time it took to write these. Only a minute or two. Shows high numbers of unhappy citizens

I made 710895 on 26 August 2025

The government clearly has something it is hiding here

rejection.details: The numbers include petitions that are never moderated let alone opened as they fail to get the required minimum of 5 additional signatories.
